_comment: Both hooks are PROJECT-SCOPED. SessionStart = a non-blocking install health check. Stop = the OPT-IN acknowledgement gate (做法 3): it blocks session-stop ONLY when the project created `.second-opinion/require_ack` AND the latest DRAFT run lacks an acknowledged Second Opinion review; anti-loop capped by SECONDOP_MAX_ACK_RETRIES; a silent no-op in any project that did not opt in, so a global install never blocks unrelated work. ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} resolves to this plugin's install location.
